name: Salisbury Neighborhood Housing Service, Inc
description_short: Non-profit housing counselor providing homebuyer education, financial counseling, and affordable lending in Salisbury, MD since 1995.
description_long:
Salisbury Neighborhood Housing Services is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization incorporated in 1994 and chartered by NeighborWorks America in July 1995. The organization serves targeted neighborhoods and populations in Salisbury, Maryland and surrounding areas with a mission to cultivate sustainable neighborhoods through partnerships and lending that inspire self-reliance, growth, and optimism.

SNHS offers three primary service areas: homebuyer preparation and counseling to help consumers get ready for homeownership, financial counseling including budgeting, credit counseling, and foreclosure avoidance assistance, and access to affordable loans for home purchases and rehabilitation projects. The organization combines private, philanthropic, and government resources to fund and expand its programs.

The organization distinguishes itself through its integrated approach combining education, counseling, and lending in a single non-profit structure. As a NeighborWorks America-chartered member, SNHS operates under national standards for housing counseling and community development. Their focus on specific neighborhoods and populations in the Salisbury area demonstrates a hyper-local commitment rather than a national or regional footprint.

SNHS is a legitimate non-profit housing counselor appropriate for consumers seeking homeownership preparation and financial guidance. The primary limitation is geographic scope—services are restricted to Salisbury and surrounding areas of Maryland, making it unavailable to consumers outside this region. No information is provided on counselor certifications, specific loan terms, or outcomes metrics.
pros: 501(c)(3) non-profit status ensures mission-driven, not-for-profit operations
NeighborWorks America charter indicates adherence to national housing counseling standards
Integrated services combining counseling, education, and lending in one organization
Free or low-cost counseling on budgeting, credit, and foreclosure avoidance
Serves underserved neighborhoods and targeted populations in Salisbury
Access to affordable lending for home purchase and rehabilitation
30-year track record since 1994 incorporation demonstrates organizational stability
cons: Geographic service area limited to Salisbury, MD and surrounding areas only
No information provided about HUD certification or counselor qualifications
No details on loan terms, interest rates, eligibility criteria, or approval rates
Website lacks specific outcomes data or customer testimonials
No information on hours of operation or appointment availability
best_for: Salisbury, MD residents seeking homebuyer counseling and preparation
Borrowers in targeted Salisbury neighborhoods needing foreclosure avoidance assistance
First-time homebuyers in surrounding Maryland areas needing affordable financing
Homeowners seeking rehabilitation loans and financial guidance
diagnosis: SNHS is best for Salisbury-area residents seeking non-profit housing counseling and affordable lending for homeownership. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation to Salisbury and surrounding areas—consumers outside this region cannot access services.
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
address: 560 Riverside Dr Ste A102, Salisbury, MD 21801
